allow: Bash(head -3 docker exec tesis_db bash -c "psql -c ''''SELECT usename FROM pg_user;''''")

  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM chunks\) AS chunks,

  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM ""user""\) AS usuarios;
")
